name: Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix brown sugar, powdered sugar, butter, and peanut butter until well combined.
2. Pat the mixture into a 9 x 13 inch pan.
3. Pour chocolate chips and remaining butter over the top of the mixture.
4. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to set.
5. Remove from the pan and cut into bars.
